info.title: BKD API
info.description: Kanban board for managing AI coding agents. Issues are assigned to CLI-based AI engines (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI) that execute autonomously.

tags.name: Issues
tags.description: Issue CRUD, bulk updates, and duplication

tags.name: Issue Commands
tags.description: Execute, follow-up, restart, cancel AI sessions

tags.name: Issue Logs
tags.description: Retrieve and filter issue conversation logs

tags.name: Engines
tags.description: AI engine discovery, settings, and models

url.description: Webhook URL or Telegram chat ID

secret.description: HMAC secret or Telegram bot token

get.summary: List detected engines and their models
List available models for an engine

post.summary: Force live re-probe of all engines

get.summary: Get logs for a cron job

get.description: Real-time event stream. Event types: log, log-updated, log-removed, tool-progress, tool-group, state, done, issue-updated, changes-summary, heartbeat (15s).
